display.purpose: Hero headline only — one per page. Cormorant Garamond 300, tight leading.

headline.purpose: Section titles. May carry italic em spans for the Signal Blue emphasis moment.

title.purpose: Card headings, pull-quote size reference. Never bold.

body.purpose: Long-form content. Max 65–75ch. Weight 300, strong at 400/500.

label.purpose: Eyebrows, cert tags, nav links, badges. Uppercase, wide tracking.

shadows.name: accent-glow
shadows.purpose: Primary button at rest. Scales to 0 10px 28px on hover.

shadows.name: featured-elev
shadows.purpose: Featured price card at rest — the sole persistent shadow.

motion.name: hover-lift
motion.purpose: Standard hover lift for interactive cards.

motion.name: underline-reveal
motion.purpose: Nav link underline on hover, origin: left center.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.purpose: Single-column layout, mobile CTA bar visible, hamburger replaces nav.

breakpoints.name: tablet
breakpoints.purpose: Grid columns reduce — three-column grids become two.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main booking CTA. Signal Blue at rest, lightens and lifts on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-block; background: #0496ff; color: #ffffff; padding: 18px 38px; border-radius: 2px; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 500; box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(4, 150, 255, 0.35); transition: background 0.2s ease, transform 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #1ba3ff; transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 10px 28px rgba(4, 150, 255, 0.5); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0496ff; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary CTA on dark backgrounds. White outline, arrow indicator.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; color: #ffffff; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none; padding: 18px 24px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.35); border-radius: 2px; font-weight: 500; transition: background 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost::after { content: '→'; font-size: 16px; transition: transform 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover::after { transform: translateX(4px); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0496ff; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Nav CTA
components.description: Inline ghost CTA in the navigation bar. Inverts on hover.
components.css: .ds-nav-cta { color: #ffffff; padding: 9px 22px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.55); border-radius: 2px; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; background: transparent; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 400; transition: background 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease, color 0.2s ease; display: inline-block; } .ds-nav-cta:hover { background: #ffffff; color: #0a2540; border-color: #ffffff; }

components.name: Cert Tag
components.description: Certification badge chip. Full-pill, subtle blue border, leading checkmark.
components.css: .ds-cert-tag { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid rgba(4,150,255,0.15); padding: 8px 14px 8px 32px; border-radius: 999px; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #5a7a99; font-weight: 500; position: relative; transition: border-color 0.2s ease, color 0.2s ease; cursor: default; } .ds-cert-tag::before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 12px; top: 50%; width: 12px; height: 12px; transform: translateY(-50%); border-radius: 50%; background-color: rgba(4,150,255,0.15); background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 12 12'><path d='M3 6.5L5 8.5L9 4' fill='none' stroke='%230496ff' stroke-width='1.6' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'/></svg>"); background-size: 8px; background-repeat: no-repeat; background-position: center; } .ds-cert-tag:hover { border-color: rgba(4,150,255,0.4); color: #1a2e45; }

components.name: How-Section Card
components.description: Dark-surface step card with ghost number, icon, heading, and body copy.
components.html:
01

Anamnese

Wir klären, wo der Druck sitzt und was dahintersteckt.
components.css: .ds-how-card { padding: 36px 32px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 4px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); transition: background 0.25s ease, border-color 0.25s ease, transform 0.25s ease; position: relative; } .ds-how-card:hover { background: rgba(4,150,255,0.06); border-color: rgba(4,150,255,0.35); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-how-num { position: absolute; top: 28px; right: 32px; font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-size: 56px; font-weight: 300; color: rgba(144,202,249,0.14); line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.02em; pointer-events: none; } .ds-how-icon { width: 56px; height: 56px; margin-bottom: 24px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(4,150,255,0.14); border: 1px solid rgba(4,150,255,0.35); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .ds-how-card h3 { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-size: 28px; font-weight: 300; color: #e3f2fd; margin: 0 0 14px; line-height: 1.2; } .ds-how-card p { font-size: 14px; color: rgba(227,242,253,0.7); line-height: 1.75; font-weight: 300; margin: 0; }

components.name: Price Card
components.description: Light-surface pricing card. Flat at rest, lifts and accents on hover.
components.html:
Standard

75 €
  • 45 Minuten Behandlung
Jetzt buchen
components.css: .ds-price-card { border: 1px solid rgba(4,150,255,0.15); padding: 48px 40px; position: relative; transition: border-color 0.25s ease, box-shadow 0.25s ease, transform 0.25s ease; background: #ffffff; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .ds-price-card:hover { border-color: #0496ff; box-shadow: 0 14px 38px rgba(10,37,64,0.12); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-price-name { font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.16em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #5a7a99; margin: 0 0 20px; font-weight: 500; } .ds-price-amount { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-size: 56px; font-weight: 300; line-height: 1; color: #0a2540; margin-bottom: 24px; }

components.name: Quote Blockquote
components.description: Italic Cormorant pull quote with the sole permitted left-border stripe.
components.html: Ich arbeite dort, wo Verhärtungen entstehen — nicht dort, wo sie sich bemerkbar machen.
components.css: .ds-quote { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 300; font-style: italic; color: #0a2540; line-height: 1.45; margin: 0; padding-left: 18px; border-left: 2px solid #0496ff; letter-spacing: -0.005em; }

components.name: Trust Bar Item
components.description: Dark-bar social proof item — icon badge + label on deep navy.
components.html: 5,0 auf Google
components.css: .ds-trust-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.92); font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.02em; } .ds-trust-item strong { color: #ffffff; font-weight: 500; } .ds-trust-icon { width: 32px; height: 32px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(4,150,255,0.14); flex-shrink: 0; }

narrative.overview:
This is the visual language of a craftsperson who doesn't need to sell themselves — only to be found and trusted. Every surface operates like a careful publication: spare, considered, unhurried. The typography carries the authority; the color is kept on a tight leash. When the accent fires, it fires with purpose.

The palette is built around a deep navy world — not dark as mood, but dark as precision instrument. The hero is drenched in it; sections breathe into a cool paper-white ground; dark-surfaced modules snap back in. The signal-blue accent appears where the eye needs a direction: calls to action, certification marks, live-status indicators. It is never decorative.

This system explicitly rejects: stock-photo wellness softness, sterile hospital whites, SaaS hero-metric templates, and nightclub-dark luxury.
keyCharacteristics: Serifed display type (Cormorant Garamond, weight 300) anchors every section as an editorial moment
Accent blue used with restraint — on CTAs, live indicators, and certification chips only
Section rhythm alternates between paper-white and deep-navy for tonal contrast
Motion is minimal: translateY(-2px) lifts, underline reveals, scroll fade-ins — no choreography
Shapes are nearly sharp: 2px radius on interactive elements, 4px on containers, full-pill on badges only

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Signal Blue and Sky Trace together are the only chromatic elements. Every other surface is a navy or tinted neutral. If a new element needs color, the answer is always a shade of blue — not a new hue.

rules.name: The Semantic Exclusivity Rule
rules.body: Star Gold is reserved for star ratings only. Open Green is reserved for the live-open status dot only. Both appear in exactly one place per page.

rules.name: The Weight Ceiling Rule
rules.body: Weight 600 (semibold) is not in this system. The highest weight is 500 (medium) on DM Sans. Display and headline stay at 300 always. Heaviness here reads as shouting.

rules.name: The Italic Signal Rule
rules.body: Italic in Cormorant Garamond is the only typographic accent on dark surfaces. On light surfaces it appears in pull quotes only. It is never used in DM Sans.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: At rest, cards have no shadow. Shadows only emerge on hover or for the one intentionally elevated featured element. A card with a shadow at rest and no hover change reads as frozen mid-interaction.

dos: Do use Cormorant Garamond at weight 300 for all display and headline text
Do reserve Signal Blue for primary CTAs, eyebrow labels, cert checkmarks, and the quote rule
Do alternate section backgrounds between Paper White and Deep Navy for tonal rhythm
Do keep body line length at 65–75ch
Do use uppercase DM Sans (11–13px, letter-spacing 0.12–0.2em) for all labels and nav links
Do write copy that is direct and specific — numbers, place names, credentials are design elements
donts: Don't add new hues — the palette is Signal Blue + navy world only
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text) anywhere
Don't build identical card grids — every section grid should find its own structure
Don't use generic wellness/spa imagery — this practice is medical-grade, not spa-grade
Don't use #ffffff or neutral grays as backgrounds — every light surface is Paper White (#f5faff)
Don't replicate SaaS landing page patterns (hero metric boxes, feature card grids, bullet benefit lists)
Don't use border-left > 2px as a colored accent stripe on cards or list items (quote blockquote is the sole exception)
Don't animate layout properties — only opacity, transform, color, background-color, border-color, box-shadow
